name: Bedtime BG 5.8 and falling
description: BG drifts from 7.4 to 5.8 by 21:10 BST (20:10 UTC). Below targetLow and falling at bedtime — tests that the bedtime nudge combines emergency sugar to stop the drop with starchy carbs for overnight. Evening injection 19:00 local, meal window expires at 21:00 local.
